product_analysis: The product appears to be a minimalist round smartwatch with a silver metallic circular case, a black inactive screen on the front view, and a smooth plain silver back casing shown in the second watch. The watch has a clean, modern design with no visible brand logo, no printed label, and no readable text on the product surface. The strap is a matte white silicone or rubber material with a standard buckle closure and multiple elongated rectangular adjustment holes. The lugs are metallic and integrated cleanly into the round case. The overall aesthetic is sleek, premium, monochrome, and contemporary. Critical integrity details to preserve exactly: round silver bezel and case shape, black blank front display, plain circular silver back, white strap color, matte soft strap texture, elongated strap holes, silver buckle hardware, and the exact minimalist unbranded appearance with no added logos, no extra buttons, no color changes, and no redesign.

Face: soft oval face, gentle jawline, medium-sized bright brown eyes, neat natural eyebrows, small nose, warm smile. Hair: dark brown to black, smooth long hair tied in a low ponytail or neat straight shoulder-length style. Makeup: natural fresh commercial beauty look with soft pink lips and light glow. Wardrobe: modern clean smart-casual outfit in white or light gray tones, such as a fitted blouse or minimal dress, elegant but modest, suitable for a tech lifestyle product. Overall vibe: youthful, trustworthy, polished, premium, friendly commercial presenter.
